info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Schedule Appointments API
info.description: The Schedule Appointments API allows users to efficiently book appointments within the microsystem. Designed for professionals and service providers, this API supports the creation of new appointments, including necessary scheduling details and participant information. Common consumers include scheduling applications and CRM systems that require seamless appointment management. By implementing this API, businesses can enhance their operational efficiency and improve client satisfaction through streamlined scheduling processes.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to create a new appointment in the system. Ensure that all required fields are populated to successfully create an appointment.

requestBody.description: Request body for creating a new appointment. This payload should contain all necessary information required to schedule an appointment, including details such as date, time, and participant information.

400.description: Request parameters are invalid; check the submitted data for errors.

200.description: The request was successful, and the response contains the requested data.

502.description: Bad gateway error; received an invalid response from the upstream server.

500.description: An unexpected server error occurred; please try again later.

404.description: The requested resource could not be found; verify the endpoint and try again.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: ErrorResponse

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates if the status of the request was successful.

error.description: Short description of the error type.

message.description: Detailed error message providing more context about the error.
message.example: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the request that caused the error.

trace.description: A trace ID that can be used for logging and diagnostics.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for how to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: This schema represents the response structure for a failed appointment operation due to a client error (HTTP 400).

example.message: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database timeout occurred while saving account information.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

customer.description: Indicates whether the error is related to customer details.

errorCode.description: A code representing the specific error.

message.description: A specific message related to the error.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Error.description: Schema representing additional details about an error.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: Appointment Response

policyId.description: Unique identifier for the policy associated with the appointment.

customerId.description: Unique identifier for the customer associated with the appointment.

policyType.description: Type of policy associated with the appointment.

coverageAmount.description: Total coverage amount of the policy.

premiumAmount.description: Premium amount to be paid for the policy.

startDate.description: Start date of the appointment in ISO 8601 format.

endDate.description: End date of the appointment in ISO 8601 format.

message.description: Message containing additional information about the appointment.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Schema representing the response for creating an appointment.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: Error Response for Appointment Operation

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful (false indicates failure).

error.description: A short error code or description.

message.description: A detailed message describing the error.
message.example: Customer details not found for policy creation.

path.description: The path of the API endpoint that was called.

trace.description: A trace identifier for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion to the user on how to resolve the issue.
suggestion.example: Verify customer details and retry the policy creation request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: This schema represents the structure of the error response returned during a failed appointment operation with a 502 status code.

example.message: Customer details not found for policy creation.

details.message: No registered customer profile exists for the provided customer ID.

example.suggestion: Verify customer details and retry the policy creation request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: ErrorResponse

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates if the operation was successful or not.

error.description: A short description of the error.

message.description: A human-readable message providing more details about the error.
message.example: Customer details not found for policy creation.

path.description: The path of the endpoint that caused the error.

trace.description: A stack trace or additional information for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for the user on how to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Verify customer details and retry the policy creation request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Schema representing the error response for a failed appointment operation.

example.message: Customer details not found for policy creation.

details.message: No registered customer profile exists for the provided customer ID.

example.suggestion: Verify customer details and retry the policy creation request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: Appointment Request

policyType.description: The type of policy being requested.

premiumAmount.description: The premium amount for the policy.

startDate.description: The start date of the policy in ISO8601 format.

endDate.description: The end date of the policy in ISO8601 format.

paymentmode.description: The mode of payment for the premium.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Schema representing the request body for creating an appointment operation.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the request was successful or not.

error.description: A short description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message about the error.
message.example: Customer details not found for policy creation.

path.description: The path of the request that failed.

trace.description: A trace identifier that can be used for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for the user on how to proceed.
suggestion.example: Verify customer details and retry the policy creation request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Schema representing the response structure for a 404 error in the appointment operations.

example.message: Customer details not found for policy creation.

details.message: No registered customer profile exists for the provided customer ID.

example.suggestion: Verify customer details and retry the policy creation request.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.

schema.description: The media type of the resource returned in the response, indicating the format of the content.
